title: The Marketing Meeting
summary: The meeting focused on reviewing updated website content in a staging environment. Vinnie Micciche suggested refining the AI messaging to focus on dealer outcomes and emphasizing human involvement, data governance, and professionalism. Michael Donovan and Joe Furnari discussed a process for Vinnie to submit revisions, and Michael agreed to set up a mirrored file/theme for rapid content updates.

decisions.description: Refine AI messaging to focus on dealer outcomes rather than "human plus AI" feature.
Reverse the "AI + Human" badge to "Human + AI".
Change "Industry Insights" to "Resources and Dealer Insights" for the blog.
Set up a mirrored file/theme for rapid website content updates (up to four times a month).

actionItems.task: Send the link to the proposed staging environment website to Vinnie Micciche for review.

expectedOutcome.description: Vinnie Micciche receives the link to the staging environment.

actionItems.task: Outline how Vinnie Micciche should organize and submit revisions for the staged website (e.g., screenshot markup, list, Slack canvas).

expectedOutcome.description: Vinnie Micciche receives instructions on how to submit revisions.

actionItems.task: Set up and send a file to Vinnie Micciche to build into Lovable as a theme with all the variables, so Vinnie Micciche can easily add content to the website.

expectedOutcome.description: Vinnie Micciche receives a file/theme that allows for easy website content updates.

actionItems.task: Reverse the order of the badges on the website to display 'Human and AI', with 'Human' first.

expectedOutcome.description: The website displays 'Human and AI' badge.

actionItems.task: Update the page in the staging environment that currently has white-on-white text for links on the live site.

expectedOutcome.description: The staging environment no longer has white-on-white text for links.

actionItems.task: Change 'Industry Insights' to 'Resources and Dealer Insights' on the website, which will become the blog section.

expectedOutcome.description: The website displays 'Resources and Dealer Insights' as the blog section title.

referencesToPast: Existing website had quirky issues with navigation and security that Michael Donovan has made progress in fixing.
